[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A game-style level-up interface shows a user profile name, a level progress bar with percentage, and several stat tiles under the heading “LEVEL UP!”.

Main Subject:  
The main focus is a rectangular, dark UI panel containing the profile name “iball” with a small highlighted badge reading “#17,” an anime-style circular avatar on the left, and prominent level information in the center. Inside the panel, there are two large tiles labeled “LEVEL” and “EXPERIENCE,” showing “3” and “8 / 200” respectively, with a horizontal progress bar beneath them. On the right side of the progress bar area, “4%” is displayed. Below, three smaller stat tiles show “MESSAGES 37,” “XP NEEDED 192,” and “NEXT LVL 4.” The UI is topped by a centered banner reading “LEVEL UP!”

Setting:  
The image appears to be a digital screen capture or UI graphic on a dark purple-to-black background with no visible real-world environment; it looks like an on-screen game menu or interface.

Visual Details:  
The color scheme uses dark navy and purple tones with gold/yellow accents for the heading and badge. The avatar is a circular portrait featuring a grayscale anime face with dark hair and bright magenta/pink highlights around the circle border. The “LEVEL” tile has a muted purple background with white text, while the “EXPERIENCE” tile has a dark teal/green background with white text. The progress bar is a long dark bar with a partially filled light portion near the left, and “4%” appears in white on the right. The layout is centered within a wide rounded rectangle with subtle borders and glow effects.

Visible Text:  
LEVEL UP!  
iball  
#17  
LEVEL PROGRESS  
LEVEL  
3  
EXPERIENCE  
8 / 200  
4%  
MESSAGES  
37  
XP NEEDED  
192  
NEXT LVL  
4  
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:  
The image shows a “LEVEL UP!” interface screen with a profile name and level progress details. It displays current level 3, experience 8 / 200, a progress bar with 4%, and small stats for messages, XP needed, and the next level.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
